landing.eyebrow: A bayyane. A tabbatar. Ba a iya jujjuyawa.
landing.title: Dandalin sakamakon zaɓe na farko na Najeriya da ya dogara da takarda.
landing.lede: An gina shi a kan Fom EC8A. Civil Society ke jagoranta. Yana da alhakin jama'a.
landing.feature1_body: Sakamako yana fitowa lokacin da bangarori masu zaman kansu da masu sa ido suka yarda.
landing.feature2_body: Kowane lamba an nuna shi tare da EC8A da aka rattaba hannu.
landing.feature3_body: Kowane hoto ana sa SHA-256, kowane abu ana haɗawa, ana ɗora a kan blockchain.

agent.phone_lede: Shigar da lambar wayar da aka yi rajista da jam'iyyarka.
agent.otp_lede: Mun aika lamba mai lamba 6 zuwa {phone}.
agent.pu_footnote: Za ka mika hoto don wannan rumfar kawai. Idan kana buƙatar canza, tuntuɓi manajan jam'iyyarka.
agent.pu_no_elections: Babu zaɓe mai aiki. Tuntuɓi manajan jam'iyyarka.
agent.capture_lede: Ɗauki hoton dukkan EC8A. Tabbatar kusurwoyi huɗu suna gani kuma sa hannu suna karantawa.
agent.confirm_offline_note: Idan ba ka kan layi ba, za a aika kai tsaye lokacin da ka dawo kan layi.
agent.done_status_queued: An mika. Ana jiran ma'aikacin fitarwa…
agent.done_queue_remaining_one: Akwai mikawa 1 da ke saura a layi.
agent.done_queue_remaining_many: Akwai mikawa {n} da ke saura a layi.
agent.queue_discard_confirm: Watsar da wannan mikawa? Hoton zai ɓace.
agent.err_phone_throttled: Buƙatun lamba sun yi yawa don wannan lamba.
agent.err_ip_throttled: Buƙatun lamba sun yi yawa daga wannan hanyar sadarwa.
agent.err_no_active_otp: Babu lamba mai aiki ga wannan lamba. Buƙaci sabuwa.
agent.err_too_many_attempts: Yawan kuskure sun yi yawa. Buƙaci sabuwar lamba.
agent.err_already_consumed: An riga an yi amfani da wannan lamba.
agent.err_phone_not_provisioned: Ba a yi rajistar wannan lamba ba. Tuntuɓi manajan jam'iyyarka.
agent.err_device_change_required: An gano sabon na'ura. Manajanka dole ya tabbatar.
agent.err_invalid_phone: Lambar wayar ba ta dace ba.
agent.err_no_pu_assigned: Babu rumfar jefa ƙuri'a da aka ba ka.
agent.err_generic: Wani abu ya faru. Da fatan za ka sake gwadawa.
